title: Interview Storage

artifacts.description: Interview CRUD and fragment handling CLI with JSONL-based storage

tests_passed: Multiple channels (sms, email, chat) can contribute fragments
Synthesis aggregates all fragments with combined_text
Seeded marking updates status and prevents new fragments
All CLI commands work (create, add, list, synthesize, mark-seeded, get-synthesis, status, list-all, delete)
Force flag required to delete seeded interviews
No deprecation warnings (fixed to use timezone-aware datetime)
edge_cases_tested: Auto-create interview on first fragment if doesn't exist
Reject fragments after interview is seeded
Force flag required to delete seeded interviews

implementation_notes.storage_structure: N5/pulse/interviews/<task-id>/ with meta.json, fragments.jsonl, synthesis.json, seed_judgment.json
implementation_notes.auto_create: add_fragment auto-creates interview if it doesn't exist
implementation_notes.seeded_protection: Once seeded, cannot add more fragments
implementation_notes.delete_protection: Seeded interviews require --force flag to delete
implementation_notes.extra_commands: Added list-all and delete commands beyond brief spec for management

notes_for_orchestrator: File already existed when Drop started - verified all functionality and fixed deprecation warnings. D2.1 (Intake) and D2.2 (Availability) can now use interview_manager.py for fragment storage. JSONL append-only pattern is simple and works well. Added extra management commands (list-all, delete) that weren't in brief but useful for debugging/cleanup.
